title: DiagnosisResponse
description: JSON body returned by POST /api/query (first diagnosis) and POST /api/answer (follow-up). The reasoner produces the diagnosis fields; the API adds session_id.

session_id.description: Diagnosis session identifier. Created on the first /api/query call; reused on subsequent /api/answer calls.

confirmed_pathways.description: Causal pathways supported by present MWS variables and retrieved evidence.

uncertain_pathways.description: Candidate pathways where key diagnostic variables are still missing from MWS data or user follow-up.

solutions.description: Suggested interventions drawn from the diagnosis framework for confirmed pathways.

panel_updates.description: Visualization keys used to highlight charts in the MWS info panel. See metadata/reference_standards.json query_triggered_panel_updates.

panel_update_explanation.description: 1–3 sentences explaining why panel_updates were chosen. Shown in the follow-up chat trail under "Action taken"; often null on the first query.

follow_up_question.description: Next structured question for the user, if any. Post-processed to exclude repeats and variables already in MWS data or prior answers.

diagnosis_revision.description: Present on follow-up (/api/answer) responses. Server-computed diff vs the prior turn.

improved.description: True when pathway ranking, confidence, or solutions changed materially.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what changed (or that ranking was unchanged).

from.description: Prior status: confirmed, uncertain, or absent.

to.description: Revised status: confirmed, uncertain, or absent.

reason.description: Short explanation of why the pathway moved.

PathwayId.description: Short causal pathway key from diagnosis_framework.json (not the full pipeline key).

variable.description: Diagnostic variable name from the framework (typically not_available in Excel corpus).

question.description: User-facing follow-up question for the missing variable.

reasoning.description: Short justification citing MWS UID, village names, and relevant variable values.

missing_variable_questions.description: Structured questions for variables still missing; sanitized server-side before response.
